title: Trump says Iran will 'pay the price' and claims they have 'taken too long' to agree to a deal
summary_full: The president's comments came after U.S. forces on Tuesday evening launched strikes against Iran.
summary_public: The president's comments came after U.S. forces on Tuesday evening launched strikes against Iran.

IR.label: negative
